case_title: LAVEN, BEJAY vs. JOHNSON, LARRY IND AND AS PARTNERS DBA et al

docket_entries.description: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-94-102036 WITH CASE CGC-94-102037, PROOF OF SERVICE, POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, DECLARATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAVEN, BEJAY HEARING SET FOR APR-29-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 06
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE WITH CASE NO. 102036 FOR TRIAL ON MAY 3, 1994
ADDED TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE DISMISSAL CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JUL-22-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04
NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE MAILED (LABOR APPEAL) COURT TRIAL SET FOR MAY-02-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LARRY IND AND AS PARTNERS DBA LARRY'S CONFECTIONS AND LMG & P GROUP             AKA LARRY'S CONFECTIONS $1,732.37 PRINCIPAL, $79.78 INTEREST, $2,561.40 WAITING TIME PENALTIES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,373.55, $2,561.40 LISTED UNDER OTHER REPRESENTS WAITING TIME PEN- ALTIES.
LAW AND MOTION, DEPT 06, MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS, CALENDAR OF APR-29-1994, GRANTED PURSUANT TO WRITTEN ORDER

CAUSE CALLED FOR COURT TRIAL. PL. PRESENT W/ANNE HIPSHMAN AS COUNSEL. DEF. PRESENT & IN PRO PER. SETTLED BY STIP. W/JUDGMENT FOR PL. - DEF. TO PAY PL. $1,142.22 - EACH SIDE BEARS THEIR COSTS & FEES. PL. TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.
COURT TRIAL CONTINUED TO MAY-03-1994 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 01 PER DEPARTMENT AT TRIAL

PROOF OF SERVICE OF ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO CONSOLIDATION FILED BY THIRD PARTY STATE LABOR COMMISSIONER SERVED APR-29-1994, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT JOHNSON, LARRY IND AND AS PARTNERS DBA LARRY'S CONFECTIONS AND LMG & P GROUP             AKA LARRY'S CONFECTIONS
